name: waveinflu-skills
description: Official WaveInflu skills for creator discovery and public email lookup

scripts.check: node --check packages/setup/bin/setup.mjs && node --check packages/setup/src/setup.mjs && node --check skills/waveinflu-discover-creators/scripts/discover.mjs && node --check skills/waveinflu-lookup-creator-email/scripts/lookup.mjs && node --test tests/*.test.mjs
